Description: News sentiment specializing in corporate action announcements
Mergers and acquisitions sentiment indicator (e.g., -1 negative, 0 neutral, +1 positive)
Earnings evaluation score indicating positive, neutral, or negative assessment (-1, 0, +1)
Earnings Release Indicator flag for earnings release events
Integer from 0 to 100 indicating the event’s relevance within the story
Number of days since a similar event was last detected within the past 365 days, up to 5 decimals
Change in analyst recommendation
Narrative impact score in [-1, 1] estimating the news item’s short-term market impact (e.g., next two hours)
News sentiment of relevant news with high confidence
Equities sentiment polarity score derived from positive/negative words in news (typically -1, 0, +1)
Editorials and commentary score indicating stance or sentiment (-1, 0, +1)
Score from 0 to 100 indicating how strongly the entity is related to the story higher is more relevant
Granular sentiment score from -1.00 to +1.00 for the story, combining multiple sentiment analysis techniques
Continuous sentiment score between -1.00 and +1.00 for the entity-event
